hero.subline: Free owner dashboard. Market data. Comparable sales. Then send your brief to competing agents — and choose the best deal.

howItWorksHunter.title: How it works
howItWorksHunter.subtitle: Three steps. Zero spam. Only what you want.
howItWorksHunter.step1Body: Tell us your areas, budget, property type, and must-haves. Takes two minutes — and it's free forever.
howItWorksHunter.step2Body: Local agents in your area receive your brief. They respond with properties that actually fit your criteria — not bulk mailouts.
howItWorksHunter.step3Body: Agent emails, listings, viewing requests — all filtered and organised in your dashboard. No more inbox chaos.

stats.stat2Label: of owners want weekly updates but don't get them
stats.stat3Label: Cost of your Yalla owner dashboard — always free

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No commission. Full control.
howItWorks.step1Body: Enter your address and get a free owner dashboard with local market data, comparable sales, and a timeline for your sale.
howItWorks.step2Body: One click sends your Owner Brief to competing agents in your area. They respond with real proposals — commission, marketing plan, portal coverage.
howItWorks.step3Body: Pick the best agent. Once instructed, they connect to your dashboard so you see every viewing, offer, and update in real time.

paths.ownerBody: Get a free dashboard with market data and comparable sales. When you're ready, send your brief to agents and choose the best deal.
paths.hunterBody: Tell us what you're looking for. We'll match you with properties and keep you updated as new homes hit the market.
paths.agentBody: Receive Owner Briefs from motivated sellers in your area. Respond with your proposal and win the instruction — on merit, not marketing spend.

whyYalla.title: Why Yalla?
whyYalla.item1Title: You get a dashboard. Not a bill.
whyYalla.item1Body: Every other platform charges you to list. We give you a free dashboard first — market data, comparable sales, a timeline for your sale. The dashboard is yours whether you use an agent or not.
whyYalla.item2Body: Instead of calling one agent and hoping for the best, you send your brief to multiple agents simultaneously. They respond with real proposals. You compare. You choose.
whyYalla.item3Body: Track every viewing, every offer, every piece of feedback in one place. If you instruct an agent, they connect to your dashboard so you see what's happening in real time.
whyYalla.item4Title: We're not agents. We're your tools.
whyYalla.item4Body: Yalla is a technology platform, not an estate agency. We don't take commission. We don't list your property. We give you the information and connections to make the best decision.

whyYallaHunter.title: Why Yalla?
whyYallaHunter.item1Body: Agents blast the same listings to thousands. 90% of what you receive doesn't match what you want. Yalla filters everything through your criteria so only relevant properties reach your dashboard.
whyYallaHunter.item2Title: Agents work for you. Not the other way around.
whyYallaHunter.item2Body: Create your Home Passport once and let agents come to you with properties that fit. No more scrolling. No more chasing. You set the brief — they deliver.
whyYallaHunter.item3Body: Viewings, offers, agent messages, property details — all tracked in your dashboard. No scattered WhatsApp threads, no lost emails, no forgotten viewings.
whyYallaHunter.item4Title: We're a platform, not an agency.
whyYallaHunter.item4Body: Yalla.House connects you with agents in your area. We don't take commission. We don't sell your data. We give you the tools to find your next home — on your terms.

about.heroTitle: On a mission to fix property
about.heroSubtitle: We are Yalla.House. German property selling without commission.
about.missionBody: To give everyone the information and connections they need to make great property decisions — without paying commission.
about.storyBody: One of our founders tried to sell a flat in London. They paid an agent 1.5% commission for very little — no live updates, no market data, no visibility into buyer feedback. That's when we realised: property selling is broken. Agents take commission but don't always deliver service. Owners don't get information. Buyers get drowned in irrelevant listings. We built Yalla to fix that.
about.value1Body: You should know what you're getting, what it costs, and what happens with your data.
about.value2Body: You own the dashboard. If you use an agent, you should compete with other agents to get the best deal.
about.value3Body: We give you real tools. Market data, comparable sales, agent proposals, message tracking. Not promises.

footer.tagline: Your property sale. Your data. Your choice of agent.

admin.noAccessMessage: This area is only for administrators.

services.heroTitle: Everything you need to sell. Nothing you don't.
services.heroSubtitle: A free owner dashboard with market data, agent briefs, and live tracking. Plus optional add-ons when you need them.
services.dashboardSubtitle: Create your dashboard in two minutes. Market data, comparable sales, and agent briefs — always free.
services.dashboardFeature1: Local market data and comparable sales
services.dashboardFeature2: Full dashboard with timeline and activity feed
services.dashboardFeature3: Send briefs to competing agents in one click
services.dashboardFeature4: Track every viewing, offer, and update in real time
services.briefSubtitle: Send one brief. Get multiple proposals. Choose the best deal.
services.briefStep1Body: Enter your property details, asking price, and what you're looking for in an agent. Takes two minutes.
services.briefStep2Body: Your brief goes to verified agents covering your area. They compete for your instruction with real proposals.
services.briefStep3Body: Review each agent's commission, marketing plan, and portal coverage. Pick the one that works for you.
services.addonsSubtitle: Only pay for what you need. Every add-on is optional and booked through your dashboard.
services.addon1Desc: High-quality interior and exterior photos by a local professional photographer.
services.addon2Desc: Accurate, agent-quality floor plans measured and drawn on-site.
services.addon3Desc: Energy Performance Certificate — required by law for every property sale.
services.addon4Desc: Featured placement and social media promotion to increase visibility.
services.addonsNote: All prices include VAT. Services are delivered by vetted local professionals.
services.compTrad2: Locked into one agent for months
services.compTrad3: No visibility into viewings or feedback
services.compTrad4: Agent controls the process and your data
services.compYalla3: Live tracking of every viewing and offer
services.compYalla4: You own your data and choose your agent

emails.ownerBriefFooter: You're receiving this because you're listed as an agent. Owner contact details are not shared until you're instructed.

emails.hunterBriefFooter: You're receiving this because your coverage area matches this hunter's search.
emails.newViewingIntro: Someone has requested a viewing for your listing.
emails.newViewingFooter: Reply directly to the buyer or confirm in your dashboard.
emails.viewingConfirmedIntro: Good news! The owner has confirmed your viewing request.
emails.viewingConfirmedBody: The owner will contact you shortly to arrange a specific time.
emails.viewingConfirmedFooter: If you have questions, you can reply to the owner's email.
emails.viewingDeclinedIntro: Unfortunately, the owner cannot offer a viewing at this time.
emails.viewingDeclinedBody: Check out more listings — perhaps you'll find the right one.
emails.agentInviteIntro: A property owner is looking for competing proposals from local agents.
emails.agentInviteDescription: Yalla.House connects motivated sellers with local agents — no upfront fees, no lock-in.
emails.agentInviteFooter: You're receiving this because you're listed as an agent. If this isn't relevant, simply ignore.

partnerAgreement.title: Yalla Partner Agreement
partnerAgreement.subtitle: One short agreement — then you're connected. Read it, sign it, start importing listings.
partnerAgreement.section1Point1: Property data accessed via Yalla's CRM API is for your internal use only. You may import it into your CRM, share it with colleagues within your agency, and use it to serve the property owner.
partnerAgreement.section1Point2: You must not republish Yalla listing data on third-party portals, scrape it in bulk, or share it outside your agency without the owner's written consent.
partnerAgreement.section1Point3: Owner personal details (name, email, phone) are only revealed once the owner accepts your proposal. Until then, all communication goes through Yalla.
partnerAgreement.section2Point1: When the owner instructs you to list their property on a portal (ImmoScout24, Immowelt, OnTheMarket, etc.), you are pre-authorised to do so under your agency's existing portal agreements.
partnerAgreement.section2Point2: Yalla does not charge for portal listings made through your own agreements. The owner's Yalla dashboard will reflect the live portal status automatically.
partnerAgreement.section2Point3: If the owner revokes your assignment, you must delist the property from any portals within 48 hours.
partnerAgreement.section3Point1: Respond to owner briefs within 48 hours. Briefs that expire without a response may affect your match score.
partnerAgreement.section3Point2: Be transparent about fees. Any commission, fixed fee, or add-on cost must be stated in your proposal before the owner accepts.
partnerAgreement.section3Point3: Yalla reserves the right to suspend API access if these terms are breached. We'll always notify you first and give you a chance to resolve it.
partnerAgreement.versionNotice: Partner Agreement v1.0 — last updated April 2026
